content: Deployment options for Next.js + PostgreSQL in 2025: (1) Railway: provides both Next.js hosting and PostgreSQL on one platform, usage-based pricing (free trial), simplest multi-service setup, one-command deployments. (2) Vercel + Neon: Vercel optimized for Next.js (zero config), Neon is serverless Postgres with free tier, but requires two platforms. (3) Render: fixed monthly pricing, colocated services, multi-region. For an academic project: Railway is the simplest path (one platform, one bill, excellent DX). Vercel+Neon is free-tier-friendly for zero-budget scenarios.
